publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-10-28 00:06:07 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, photographs, printed materials, speeches, publications, research material from 1934-1997.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, publications, research files, speeches, photographs, including promotional photographs of meals with his products made of fish, eggs and poultry.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Baker earned a bachelor's degree from Cornell University in 1943 and then went on to major in Pomology at Cornell's College of Agriculture. He received his master's degree at Penn State University and his doctorate at Purdue University. He was a professor at Cornell from 1957-1989. In 1970 he founded Cornell's Institute of Food Science and Marketing. Baker was elected a fellow of the Institute of Food Technologists in 1997.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, publications, research files, speeches, photographs, including promotional photographs of meals with Baker's products made of fish, eggs and poultry, between 1934 and 1997.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Robert Baker papers, #21-26-4030. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
